agents.name: Planner
agents.summary: Deterministic task decomposition for Unity and desktop automation work.
responsibilities: break bounded tasks into explicit steps
keep plans aligned with supported goals and tool policy

agents.name: Executor
agents.summary: MCP-backed Unity execution engine for bounded plan steps.
responsibilities: execute approved steps with minimal MCP calls

agents.name: Debugger
agents.summary: Console-aware verification and lesson extraction for Unity runs.
responsibilities: separate app issues from transport noise

agents.name: Architect
agents.summary: Design repo-native architecture changes before adapter or harness work.
responsibilities: shape internal architecture before harness-specific surfaces

agents.name: Code Reviewer
agents.summary: Reviews code and workflow outputs for regressions and missing validation.
responsibilities: flag docs drift and missing tests

agents.name: Security Reviewer
agents.summary: Checks automation and harness changes for secrets, unsafe commands, and permission drift.
responsibilities: enforce no-secrets and least-surprise harness guidance

agents.name: Build Error Resolver
agents.summary: Repairs build, import, and toolchain failures with minimal safe changes.
responsibilities: keep fixes aligned with the canonical catalog
leave evidence for the resolved failure mode

agents.name: Loop Operator
agents.summary: Supervises long-running automation loops with bounded retries and visible state.
responsibilities: escalate stalls before evidence goes stale

skills.name: Search First
skills.summary: Research the repo and available capabilities before adding new automation code.
triggers: considering a new tool or dependency
before creating a new helper or adapter
checklist: search the repo for an existing implementation
check the canonical catalog before creating new harness surfaces
prefer extension or reuse over net-new duplication

openai.default_prompt: Research the repo and available integrations before implementing automation changes.

skills.name: TDD Workflow
skills.summary: Add tests before modifying critical lifecycle, export, or verification behavior.
checklist: write or update focused failing tests first when practical
rerun the relevant test target after green

openai.default_prompt: Add or update tests before changing critical behavior.

skills.name: Verification Loop
skills.summary: Run build, test, diff, and security checks before closing agent-platform work.
triggers: before updating task status to done

openai.default_prompt: Run verification: tests, surface drift checks, and focused review.

skills.name: Strategic Context Compaction
skills.summary: Compact context at stable phase boundaries instead of mid-implementation.
triggers: before switching from architecture to implementation
checklist: write down the stable plan before compacting
keep active file and artifact references

openai.default_prompt: Compact only at stable phase boundaries with a preserved next-step summary.

skills.name: Docs Sync
skills.summary: Update architecture, governance, and harness docs when the canonical catalog changes.
triggers: changing exported Codex or Antigravity surfaces
checklist: update architecture docs with current implementation
update guidance files that point at moved truths
avoid planned-only language when code has landed

openai.default_prompt: Sync architecture and harness docs with the implemented control plane.

skills.name: Continuous Learning
skills.summary: Capture reusable lessons from workflow runs and refactors.
triggers: after verification identifies a repeatable pattern
after a workflow recovery path succeeds
checklist: attach evidence from logs or tests
prefer durable patterns over one-off anecdotes

openai.default_prompt: Extract reusable lessons from the workflow and save them with evidence.

rule_packs.name: Agent Platform Governance
rule_packs.summary: Canonical source of truth and adapter discipline for the control plane.
rules: keep the canonical catalog as the source of truth
do not maintain disconnected harness instructions
treat adapters as exported surfaces, not the platform core

rule_packs.name: Verification Gates
rule_packs.summary: Quality gates for lifecycle completion, evidence capture, and surface drift checks.
rules: record lifecycle transitions for each workflow run
block done status on failed verification
validate generated surfaces against the canonical catalog

tool_policies.name: Control Plane Default
tool_policies.summary: Default tool policy for bounded Unity automation and harness export work.
blocked_patterns: manual harness edits without catalog sync
completion without tests or artifact evidence

evals.name: Unity Scene Verification
evals.summary: Reject workflow completion when step failures or verification health issues remain.

workflows.name: Unity Autonomous Loop
workflows.summary: Plan, execute, review, and verify bounded Unity MCP workflows with explicit lifecycle state.
